narrative:
Elizabeth Twp. township has 1,674 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.1 percentage points.
